targets.query:
// signal_wait_time_ms를 delta 값으로 가져오기
signal_wait_delta = from(bucket: "dba")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "sqlserver_waitstats" and r["_field"] == "signal_wait_time_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["sql_instance"] == ${Instance:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == ${host:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["measurement_db_type"] == "SQLServer")
  |> derivative(unit: v.windowPeriod, nonNegative: true, columns: ["_value"], timeColumn: "_time")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "signal_wait_time_ms"})

// wait_time_ms를 value로 가져오기
wait_time_value = from(bucket: "dba")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "sqlserver_waitstats" and r["_field"] == "wait_time_ms") // r["_measurement"] == "sqlserver_requests" 도 있음 (delta 아님)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["sql_instance"] == ${Instance:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == ${host:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["measurement_db_type"] == "SQLServer")
  |> derivative(unit: v.windowPeriod, nonNegative: true, columns: ["_value"], timeColumn: "_time")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "wait_time_ms"})

// 두 스트림을 조인하여 최종 연산 수행
join(
  tables: {signal: signal_wait_delta, wait: wait_time_value},
  on: ["_time"]
)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      // signal_wait_time_ms: r.signal_wait_time_ms,
      // wait_time_ms: r.wait_time_ms,
      signal_wait_percent: if exists r.signal_wait_time_ms and exists r.wait_time_ms and r.wait_time_ms != 0.0 then (float(v: r.signal_wait_time_ms) * 100.0) / float(v: r.wait_time_ms) else 0.0
    })
  )
  |> yield(name: "mean")
